description: Use when the user invokes /keystone or explicitly asks Keystone to route work.

defaultPrompt: Use Keystone to route this task before editing.
Use Keystone to review this branch for blockers.
Use Keystone to ship this change with proof.
interface.longDescription: Keystone routes AI coding work through one public entrypoint, with internal modules and gates for research, shaping, implementation, debugging, review, and shipping.
interface.shortDescription: One doorway for disciplined AI workflows.

name: keystone
